extraction.one_line_summary: MATTHEWS Michael won stage 3 sprint after JAYCO Alula paced hard on climbs to distance pure sprinters, taking Pedersen in final meters.
tactical_patterns: JAYCO Alula deliberately paced third category climbs hard with ZANA to shed pure sprinters before MATTHEWS sprint finish.
EVENEPOEL Remco contested intermediate bonus seconds despite holding maglia rosa, extending GC gaps by single opportunistic seconds.
PINOT Thibaut attacked twice for KOM points then immediately sat up, harvesting mountains jersey without wasting energy for GC.
MCNULTY Brandon surprisingly dropped on hilly stage suggests UAE struggling to protect co-leadership options before mountain stages.

rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: First Giro stage win since 2015 after team executed perfect attrition strategy on climbs
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: Dropped on climbs but chased back to contest sprint, showing recovery ability after stage 2 crash
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: negative: Unexpectedly dropped on moderate climbs, major GC red flag before serious mountain stages
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Still aggressively hunting bonus seconds despite leading GC, reveals ruthless marginal gains mentality
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: neutral: Targeted KOM points with minimal energy expenditure, confirming secondary classification focus over GC
rider_signals.ZANA Filippo: positive: Italian champion executed domestique role perfectly pacing climbs for MATTHEWS despite racing for Australian team
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: Third place after surviving climbs shows he can compete in hillier sprints better than expected
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: neutral: Caught in crash but successfully chased back, no lasting damage but lost positioning energy
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: negative: Expected to compete but absent from finale, suggests form not at anticipated level
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: negative: Dropped on climbs despite profile suiting his puncheur characteristics, worrying weakness signal
